A musical radio player for your fashion wardrobe.

This UGC item unlocks 50+ songs across expanded playlists of different music genres, curated specifically for Catalog Avatar Creator. We have recently updated this UGC to the v2 music player that now includes audio-reactive auras and upgraded skins for a unique look. 

This UGC item is also an update to the original, optimizing the boombox visually. It just looks better!
